figures.caption: Fig. 3: The overview design of BugForge. BugForge is an end-to-end framework for DBMS bug repository construction and utilization. It progressively collects bug reports, applies syntax-aware processing and the input-adaptive LLM pipeline with RAG to extract raw PoCs and constructs a DBMS bug repository. Next, BugForge converts raw PoCs into high-quality test cases through semantic-guided adaptation under a stable environment and subsequently employs these cases in DBMS testing (e.g., fuzzing, regression, and cross-DBMS testing).
TABLE IV: List of previously unknown bugs detected by DBMS testing with BugForge employed
